## What does this PR do?

<!-- One paragraph. Focus on the why, not the what. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (new manager support, new command, etc.)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] TypeScript compiles cleanly (`npm run lint`)

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I've updated [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] I've updated `README.md` if the supported managers table changed
